mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, task_id, issue_desc, impact, owner_id, status, due_date, resolved_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_issue WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, project_id, task_id, issue_desc, impact, owner_id, status, due_date, resolved_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_issue WHERE deleted = 0 AND due_date < #{today} AND status NOT IN ('RESOLVED', 'CLOSED')
